texto: I suddenly felt like the Grinch feels when he discovers what Chrismas is all about. For the first time in a long time, I felt like I had a purpose being in the Navy. It wasn't about money and rank or prestige. It was about raising the flag. We do what we do because no one else can or will do it. We fight so others can sleep at night. And I had forgotten that.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Timothy Ciciora: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I suddenly felt like the Grinch feels when he discovers what Chrismas is all about. For the first…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, inspiracional, military pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e inspiracao.
